title: New feeling
description: New feeling aims to provide players with a new feeling and offer certain performance optimization and beautification based on the original version.
body:
# ![Newfeeling Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7101c02fc790d4f588a0504a4f360ce1c9d78fd1_0.webp)
### **New Feeling: A Refreshed Minecraft Experience**  
**Authorization Statement**  
This modpack is distributed under the **[CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/deed.zh)** license:  
- ✅ **Allowed**: Free sharing and adaptation (with attribution)  
- ❌ **Prohibited**: Commercial use  
- 🔄 **Required**: Adapted works must retain the same license  

**Core Philosophy**  
(Other content remains unchanged...)  

---

### **Why Choose CC BY-NC-SA?**  
1. **Protect Creators**: Prevent commercial abuse while encouraging community二次创作  
2. **Maintain Open Source Spirit**: Derivative works must contribute back to the community (SA clause)  
3. **Clarify Legal Boundaries**: Players can safely use or modify without copyright risks  

> Full license text available at [Creative Commons Official Website](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/)

---

### **Introduction**  
**Core Philosophy**  
While preserving the essence of the original version, we aim to enhance your gaming experience through a balance of **performance optimization** and **visual beautification**. Free Team believes that you shouldn't have to choose between "smooth" and "beautiful" — this modpack is our answer.  

**Key Features**  
- **Smooth and Beautiful Coexistence**: Improve frame rate and loading speed while enhancing visual details.  
- **Enhanced Freshness**: Subtle adjustments to the original mechanics bring new life to familiar gameplay.  
- **Easy to Learn, Hard to Master**: Fun for both casual and hardcore players.  

**Important Notes**  
- **Client-Side Only**: This modpack primarily modifies the client. It is **not recommended for servers**.  
- **Feedback and Collaboration Welcome**:  
  - Encounter issues or have ideas? Submit feedback on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/Rapid-carbon-neutralization/Newfeeling/issues).  
  - The mod list is open-source, and contributions are welcome (but please respect the original design tone).  

**Term Explanations**  
- **VK**: Refers to Vulkan graphics interface support  
- **CE**: Community-maintained version (updated by players)  

---

### **Adjustment Notes**  
1. **Clearer Logic**: Organized by modules to avoid the scattered presentation of the original version.  
2. **Reduced Conflicts**: Transformed the issue of "performance optimization and beautification being challenging" into a positive solution ("no need to choose").  
3. **Emphasized Openness**: Clearly defined collaboration methods, encouraging player participation.  
4. **Added Details**: Included term explanations to eliminate ambiguities.
**关于简体中文请[点击这里](https://github.com/Rapid-carbon-neutralization/Newfeeling/)**
